latest.title: Dogs read human pointing surprisingly well

latest.title: Mushrooms don’t just sit there they’re busy

latest.title: dogs don’t wag tails to show happiness
latest.script_key: dogs wag tails to talk not just to show happiness that tail sweep isn t always joy it can be conflict or focus see how the lab s tail stiffens when the person stops feeding that s why dogs don t wag tails the way you think what s your dog actually saying right now
